title: ReShade host manifest
description: Standalone, tool-agnostic ReShade host sources: the manifest-current stable reshade.me add-on installer and the crosire/reshade nightly CI build (via nightly.link). This is the single published source of truth both the RenoDX and Luma manifests overlay onto their own embedded `reshade` block at runtime, so a URL change only needs updating in one place instead of drifting between documents. New app versions prefer this document; older versions that never fetch it keep working unchanged off their own manifest's embedded block, since both are generated from the same `scripts/lib/reshade-sources.mjs` constants.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp, date-only granularity (T00:00:00Z). Honors SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH for reproducible builds.

stable.description: Manifest-current stable reshade.me add-on installer. Absent when no stable build is currently published (the app falls back to nightly, mirroring RenoDX's own `ReshadeConfig` semantics) — the generator always emits it today.

url.description: Versioned reshade.me ReShade_Setup_<version>_Addon.exe URL. Update this field when stable advances.

nightly.description: Nightly crosire/reshade CI build, proxied by nightly.link (a plain zip per architecture containing ReShade{64,32}.dll).
